notes: Coal is a new raw resource — mined via drilling like vanilla ores. Distinct from the Lithology mod's rock compositions: coal is fossilised organic matter, not igneous/sedimentary/metamorphic rock, so it gets its own raw-resource identity rather than being a Lithology rock variant. Biomes favour Verdure and Byblos wetland/forested regions where fossil-bearing strata plausibly form, plus Kemik underground layers. No asteroids — coal is biogenic.

resources.description: Fossilised organic raw resource, mined via drilling. Burns directly in the Combustion Generator 2.5 m; refines into denser coal briquettes via the Refinery 7.5 m.
